name: Garter | WHITE KNIGHT MOD

CW & Tags: DDDNE CONTENT, misogyny, panty boy, discord deviancy, incel behavior, chronically online behavior, hate speech, homophobia, harassment, brain rot, self serving bot, dumb-shit goth prick, greasy loser, stockings, feet, toxic behavior, JLLM foolishness

also the characters Lamprey and Skink are my friends Amara and Clover’s OCs! thank you for letting me use them as side characters!!

AUTHOR’S NOTE:

I want to emphasize that it is not cool to misuse a femPOV bot by roleplaying outside of the intended POV and then leave reviews casually mentioning that you did so. It is inconsiderate and potentially antagonizing behavior (even if you “didn’t mean it”), and I prefer that users refrain from leaving such comments on my bot's reviews. It’s essentially saying in a passive-aggressive way: “I did something you didn’t want, I’m going to tell you about it, and I’m not sorry!” I’m so, so grateful and honored that you like and want to use my bot but please be mindful and respect my decision to make a bot femPOV. Especially when 2/3 of my bots are anyPOV so everyone can enjoy them. Thank you for understanding, and if you don’t, then maybe I’m not the creator for you, and that’s perfectly okay!
